Paperclip
4Enterprise

Enterprise Agent Orchestration. Kubernetes native.

The enterprise extension of the open-source orchestrator Paperclip. Native Kubernetes integration, governance features and enterprise security. Built pragmatically from real client projects. Ready to deploy.

Demo anfragen See features
In development Kubernetes native Open-source base Enterprise-Ready Self-hosted RBAC & Audit
Capabilities

Built for
enterprise deployment

Everything Paperclip open-source offers, extended with what enterprise really needs.

Native Kubernetes integration

Agents run as native Kubernetes workloads. Full compatibility with existing K8s clusters, Helm charts and GitOps workflows.

RBAC and permissions

Granular role-based access control for every agent, every tool group and every workflow. Compatible with existing IAM systems.

Complete audit trail

Every agent action, every tool call and every decision is logged without gaps. Exportable for SIEM systems and compliance audits.

Enterprise Security

TLS encryption for all agent communication, secrets management via Vault or Kubernetes Secrets, and network policies out of the box.

Multi-tenant ready

Isolated namespaces for different teams, projects or clients. Resource quotas and network isolation at cluster level.

Monitoring and observability

Native Prometheus metrics, Grafana dashboards for agent performance and OpenTelemetry integration for distributed tracing.

High availability and auto-scaling

Horizontal auto-scaling for agent workloads based on queue depth and CPU load. Automatic failover with health checks.

SSO and identity integration

OIDC/SAML integration with existing identity providers (Azure AD, Okta, Keycloak). Single sign-on across all agent management.

Enterprise support and SLA

Dedicated support channel, guaranteed response times and a personal Technical Account Manager from the arconsis Forge team.

Workflow

From ticket to deploy.

Four phases. No black-box moment. Scroll slowly to see the agent at work.

01 · Ticket

Request.

A Jira ticket, a GitHub issue, an email. The agent reads, understands context and checks acceptance criteria before touching anything.

02 · Plan

Strategy.

The agent breaks the work into tasks, identifies risks and calls only the tools it is authorized for. RBAC, not wishful thinking.

03 · Ausführung

Execution.

Writing code, running tests, commits on a feature branch. Every action in the audit trail: exportable, traceable, reversible.

04 · Review

Human-in-the-loop.

PR with summary, diff and reasoning. A human approves, merges, deploys. The agent prepares. The decision stays with you.

Positioning

Open source vs. enterprise

Paperclip4Enterprise builds on the community project without upstream conflicts, with a clear extension layer.

Community-Projekt · GitHub · MIT License
